title: Conectar ideas · Connect ideas and feelings
focus: Discourse connectors, opinion verbs, more nuanced feelings.

words.example: La reunión empieza a las diez en punto.
words.example_en: The meeting starts at ten sharp.

words.example: Tiene mucha experiencia en hostelería.
words.example_en: She has lots of experience in hospitality.

words.example: Esa decisión cambió mi vida.
words.example_en: That decision changed my life.

words.example: Necesito un consejo sobre mi viaje.
words.example_en: I need some advice about my trip.

words.example: Tengo un buen recuerdo de aquel verano.
words.example_en: I have a good memory of that summer.

words.example: Intento hablar español todos los días.
words.example_en: I try to speak Spanish every day.

words.example: Conseguí entradas para el concierto.
words.example_en: I managed to get tickets for the concert.

words.example: No olvides cerrar la puerta.
words.example_en: Don't forget to close the door.

words.example: Recuerdo perfectamente aquel día.
words.example_en: I remember that day perfectly.

words.example: El profesor lo explica con calma.
words.example_en: The teacher explains it patiently.

words.example: Decidimos no salir esta noche.
words.example_en: We decided not to go out tonight.

words.example: Es un barrio tranquilo y agradable.
words.example_en: It's a calm and pleasant neighbourhood.

words.example: Es difícil aprender un idioma sin practicar.
words.example_en: It's difficult to learn a language without practising.

words.example: El examen fue más fácil de lo esperado.
words.example_en: The exam was easier than expected.

words.example: Es una idea interesante para el proyecto.
words.example_en: It's an interesting idea for the project.

words.example: La película fue un poco aburrida.
words.example_en: The film was a bit boring.

words.example: Casi llego tarde a la cita.
words.example_en: I almost arrived late to the appointment.

words.example: Todavía no he comido nada.
words.example_en: I still haven't eaten anything.

words.example: Ya he terminado mis tareas.
words.example_en: I've already finished my tasks.

words.example: Llovía mucho; sin embargo, salimos.
words.example_en: It was raining a lot; nevertheless, we went out.

words.example: Estaba cansado, por eso me fui pronto.
words.example_en: I was tired, that's why I left early.

words.example: Me di cuenta de mi error tarde.
words.example_en: I realised my mistake too late.

words.example: La oportunidad es importante en este contexto.
words.example_en: Opportunity is important in this context.

words.example: El cambio es importante en este contexto.
words.example_en: Change is important in this context.

words.example: La causa es importante en este contexto.
words.example_en: Cause is important in this context.

words.example: La consecuencia es importante en este contexto.
words.example_en: Consequence is important in this context.

words.example: El motivo es importante en este contexto.
words.example_en: Reason; motive is important in this context.

words.example: La razón es importante en este contexto.
words.example_en: Reason is important in this context.

words.example: El resultado es importante en este contexto.
words.example_en: Result is important in this context.

words.example: El error es importante en este contexto.
words.example_en: Mistake; error is important in this context.

words.example: La solución es importante en este contexto.
words.example_en: Solution is important in this context.

words.example: La duda es importante en este contexto.
words.example_en: Doubt; question is important in this context.

words.example: La opinión es importante en este contexto.
words.example_en: Opinion is important in this context.

words.example: El punto de vista es importante en este contexto.
words.example_en: Point of view is important in this context.

words.example: El acuerdo es importante en este contexto.
words.example_en: Agreement is important in this context.

words.example: El desacuerdo es importante en este contexto.
words.example_en: Disagreement is important in this context.

words.example: La confianza es importante en este contexto.
words.example_en: Trust; confidence is important in this context.

words.example: El miedo es importante en este contexto.
words.example_en: Fear is important in this context.

words.example: La alegría es importante en este contexto.
words.example_en: Joy is important in this context.

words.example: La tristeza es importante en este contexto.
words.example_en: Sadness is important in this context.

words.example: El enfado es importante en este contexto.
words.example_en: Anger is important in this context.

words.example: La vergüenza es importante en este contexto.
words.example_en: Embarrassment; shame is important in this context.

words.example: La paciencia es importante en este contexto.
words.example_en: Patience is important in this context.

words.example: El éxito es importante en este contexto.
words.example_en: Success is important in this context.

words.example: El fracaso es importante en este contexto.
words.example_en: Failure is important in this context.

words.example: El riesgo es importante en este contexto.
words.example_en: Risk is important in this context.

words.example: La mejora es importante en este contexto.
words.example_en: Improvement is important in this context.

words.example: El desarrollo es importante en este contexto.
words.example_en: Development is important in this context.

words.example: La relación es importante en este contexto.
words.example_en: Relationship is important in this context.

words.example: El comportamiento es importante en este contexto.
words.example_en: Behaviour is important in this context.

words.example: Es importante opinar con calma.
words.example_en: It is important to give an opinion calmly.

words.example: Aprendo a creer en situaciones reales.
words.example_en: I learn to believe in real situations.

words.example: Intento pensar un poco cada día.
words.example_en: I try to think a little every day.

words.example: Tengo que sentir antes de salir.
words.example_en: I have to feel before leaving.

words.example: Quiero parecer con más seguridad.
words.example_en: I want to seem with more confidence.

words.example: Es importante importar con calma.
words.example_en: It is important to matter; be important calmly.

words.example: Aprendo a preocupar en situaciones reales.
words.example_en: I learn to worry in real situations.

words.example: Intento sorprender un poco cada día.
words.example_en: I try to surprise a little every day.

words.example: Tengo que molestar antes de salir.
words.example_en: I have to bother before leaving.

words.example: Quiero agradecer con más seguridad.
words.example_en: I want to thank; appreciate with more confidence.

words.example: Es importante aceptar con calma.
words.example_en: It is important to accept calmly.

words.example: Aprendo a rechazar en situaciones reales.
words.example_en: I learn to reject in real situations.

words.example: Intento proponer un poco cada día.
words.example_en: I try to propose a little every day.

words.example: Tengo que recomendar antes de salir.
words.example_en: I have to recommend before leaving.

words.example: Quiero aconsejar con más seguridad.
words.example_en: I want to advise with more confidence.

words.example: Es importante permitir con calma.
words.example_en: It is important to allow calmly.

words.example: Aprendo a prohibir en situaciones reales.
words.example_en: I learn to forbid in real situations.

words.example: Intento obligar un poco cada día.
words.example_en: I try to force; oblige a little every day.

words.example: Tengo que prometer antes de salir.
words.example_en: I have to promise before leaving.

words.example: Quiero cumplir con más seguridad.
words.example_en: I want to fulfil; keep with more confidence.

words.example: Es importante faltar con calma.
words.example_en: It is important to be missing; lack calmly.

words.example: Aprendo a sobrar en situaciones reales.
words.example_en: I learn to be left over in real situations.

words.example: Intento empeorar un poco cada día.
words.example_en: I try to get worse a little every day.

words.example: Tengo que resolver antes de salir.
words.example_en: I have to solve before leaving.

words.example: Quiero comparar con más seguridad.
words.example_en: I want to compare with more confidence.

words.example: Es importante depender con calma.
words.example_en: It is important to depend calmly.

words.example: Hoy me siento preocupado.
words.example_en: Today I feel worried.

words.example: Hoy me siento satisfecho.
words.example_en: Today I feel satisfied.

words.example: Hoy me siento decepcionado.
words.example_en: Today I feel disappointed.

words.example: Hoy me siento orgulloso.
words.example_en: Today I feel proud.

words.example: Hoy me siento inseguro.
words.example_en: Today I feel insecure; unsure.

words.example: Es un detalle capaz.
words.example_en: It is a capable detail.

words.example: Este tema es incapaz.
words.example_en: This topic is incapable.

words.example: Es una persona responsable.
words.example_en: He or she is a responsible person.

words.example: Es una persona irresponsable.
words.example_en: He or she is a irresponsible person.

words.example: Es una persona maduro.
words.example_en: He or she is a mature person.

words.example: Me parece común.
words.example_en: It seems common to me.

words.example: Es un detalle raro.
words.example_en: It is a strange; rare detail.

words.example: Este tema es probable.
words.example_en: This topic is likely.

words.example: Me parece posible.
words.example_en: It seems possible to me.

words.example: La situación cambia incluso.
words.example_en: The situation changes even.

words.example: Lo hago además cuando puedo.
words.example_en: I do it besides; furthermore when I can.

words.example: Normalmente respondo tampoco.
words.example_en: Normally I answer neither; either.

words.example: La situación cambia apenas.
words.example_en: The situation changes hardly.

words.example: En mi opinión, la solución es clara.
words.example_en: In my opinion, the solution is clear.

words.example: Desde mi punto de vista, falta información.
words.example_en: From my point of view, information is missing.

words.example: Por un lado, es barato; por otro, está lejos.
words.example_en: On one hand, it is cheap; on the other, it is far.

words.example: Por otro lado, el barrio es muy tranquilo.
words.example_en: On the other hand, the neighbourhood is very quiet.

words.example: Tengo miedo de cometer un error.
words.example_en: I am afraid of making a mistake.

words.example: Echo de menos a mi familia.
words.example_en: I miss my family.
